event: View from a Balcony over a Mediterranean Coastal Town
description: A panoramic view from an elevated terrace overlooking a Mediterranean coastal town. In the foreground, several small figures stand on a stone balcony adorned with flowering plants. Below, a domed church rises among tightly packed buildings descending toward a harbor. Tall cypress and umbrella pine trees frame the scene. The sea stretches to the horizon where a distant headland fades into golden haze. The sky is luminous with warm sunset tones.
